error.message: V620 is not an initial execution target for vLLM in this project.

notes: Unsupported rows are recorded before MI300X/NVIDIA test environments are available.

error.message: V620 is not an initial execution target for SGLang in this project.

notes: Unsupported rows are recorded before MI300X/NVIDIA test environments are available.

error.message: ROCm/ATOM is recorded as reference code first; V620 execution is deferred.

notes: Unsupported rows are recorded before MI300X/NVIDIA test environments are available.

error.message: TensorRT-LLM is not an AMD GPU target.

notes: Unsupported rows are recorded before MI300X/NVIDIA test environments are available.
llama-bench reports separate prompt-processing and token-generation rows; total token/s is computed from those two averages.
context_length records prompt_tokens + generated_tokens because this llama-bench mode does not expose an independent n_ctx sweep.
llama.cpp split_mode=none; this is not the same as vLLM/SGLang pipeline parallelism.
